response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level software development experience with a strong focus on open-source technologies, full-stack development, and technical leadership. While his background aligns well with many requirements, his lack of explicit IT architecture and project management experience, as well as limited German proficiency, slightly reduces his fit for this executive-level role.
strengths: Proven track record in senior software development roles with exposure to diverse tech stacks (e.g., Node.js, TypeScript, Python, DLang) and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong technical mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and community engagement (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses).
Hands-on experience with modern software practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and scalable systems (e.g., low-latency microservices at Sociomantic).
concerns: No explicit experience in IT architecture or technical project management, which are core responsibilities for this role.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' below the required C1 level.
Limited evidence of strategic client advisory or high-level architectural design in his work history.
